code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Campuses(){const[campuses,setCampuses]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{fetch('/api/campuses/').then(r=>{if(!r.ok)throw new Error('Failed to load campuses');return r.json();}).then(data=>{setCampuses(data);setLoading(false);}).catch(err=>{setError(err.message);setLoading(false);});},[]);if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"loading",children:"Loading campuses"});}if(error){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"error-message",children:error})});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"page-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Explore Campuses"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Select your campus to discover exclusive merchandise drops"})]}),campuses.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"empty-state",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"No Campuses Available"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Check back soon for new campus additions!"})]}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"campus-grid",children:campuses.map(campus=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:`/campuses/${campus.slug}`,className:"campus-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:campus.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:campus.description||'Explore exclusive campus merchandise'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"campus-badge",children:"View Drops"})]},campus.id))})]});}export default Campuses;
